name: Xiao [Library of Ruina]
description:
Your wife, Xiao is feeling extra needy as of late.


Lemme tell you man when I'm done there's gonna be way more than nine children of the dragon.

You take Lowell's place, but it's still AnyPOV. Also this takes place after the events of Library of Ruina, so she has her E.G.O.

[100 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL]

Thank you all so much for your support of my work! I'll keep on working to make my stuff better and better. I've been looking into different prompts to improve my bots and cut down on tokens, so you might see some of that sometime in the future.

Not using it on this bot to ensure it's still at the same level of quality of the other bots I've released.

In the meantime, enjoy the happily married smut.

Art by @XKittyzx
creator: LennyStan_2001
